name: Agentic Memory
description: Memory capture, retrieval, and optional context augmentation for OpenClaw.

backendUrl.label: Backend URL
backendUrl.help: Agentic Memory backend URL that exposes the /openclaw endpoints.

apiKey.label: API Key
apiKey.help: Bearer token for the Agentic Memory backend. Prefer OpenClaw env interpolation such as ${AGENTIC_MEMORY_API_KEY}.

workspaceId.label: Workspace ID
workspaceId.help: Optional workspace override. Agentic Memory normally auto-resolves workspace from the current agent/default config.

deviceId.label: Device ID
deviceId.help: Stable identifier for the current device.

agentId.label: Agent ID
agentId.help: Stable identifier for the current OpenClaw agent. Workspace defaults to this agent identity unless explicitly overridden.

mode.label: Mode
mode.help: Use capture_only to capture turns and serve memory without adding custom context blocks. Use augment_context to also assemble Agentic Memory context for each turn.

projectId.label: Project ID
projectId.help: Legacy static project fallback. The preferred model is to start and stop projects at runtime instead of baking one into install-time config.

contextEngineId.label: Context Engine ID
contextEngineId.help: Context engine id to register with OpenClaw. Defaults to agentic-memory. Capture-only mode still uses this slot internally as the turn-lifecycle hook surface.
